name: Marriott Bonvoy Brilliant® American Express® Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn 200,000 Marriott Bonvoy bonus points after you use your new Card to make $6,000 in purchases within the first 6 months of Card Membership. Offer Ends 5/13/2026.

earning_rates.notes: 6x per $1 on eligible purchases at hotels participating in Marriott Bonvoy. Combined with 10x base member bonus = up to 16x total for Platinum Elite members.

annual_credits.name: Brilliant Dining Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $300 per year (up to $25 per month) in statement credits for eligible purchases at restaurants worldwide.

annual_credits.name: Marriott Property Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $100 property credit for qualifying charges at The Ritz-Carlton or St. Regis when booking direct for a two-night minimum stay using the card.

lounge_access.other: Priority Pass Select membership with unlimited visits to 1,200+ airport lounges worldwide.

hotel_status.description: Automatic Platinum Elite status with the card. Includes room upgrades (including suites when available), late checkout, welcome gift, and 50% bonus on base points.

other_benefits.name: Annual Free Night Award
other_benefits.description: One Free Night Award each year after card renewal month, valid for one night at or under 85,000 Marriott Bonvoy points at participating hotels.

other_benefits.name: Brilliant Earned Choice Award
other_benefits.description: After spending $60,000 on eligible purchases in a calendar year, choose one benefit (e.g., additional free night, suite upgrade award, etc.).

other_benefits.name: 25 Elite Night Credits
other_benefits.description: 25 Elite Night Credits each calendar year toward Marriott Bonvoy Elite status.

other_benefits.name: Global Entry/TSA PreCheck Credit
other_benefits.description: Up to $120 every 4 years for Global Entry or up to $85 for TSA PreCheck every 4.5 years.

other_benefits.name: The Hotel Collection
other_benefits.description: $100 hotel credit on qualifying charges plus room upgrade when available for 2+ night stays via Amex Travel.

insurance.notes: Trip cancellation/interruption coverage when round-trip is purchased entirely with the card. Strong all-around travel protections.

sources.notes: Current 200K offer, earning rates, Platinum Elite status, annual credits, offer history
200K offer details and offer history confirmation
